title: Easy Mob Spawn Control - spawn rate, mob cap, disable bad mobs
description: Quickly adjust spawn rate, ban mobs or change mob limit with in-game menu
body:
**Easy Mob Spawn Control** is a way to quickly disable mobs, adjust spawn rates, and modify mob caps without editing config files or looking up IDs.

This mod has an in-game menu accessible from:
- The Mods menu (via the config button)
- Pressing '**K**'
- Typing in chat: **/easymobspawncontrol** or **/easymsc**

You can:
- Edit spawn rates,
- Ban mobs,
- Edit mob caps,
- Disable spawn types,
- Edit biome spawns.

**Guide:**

**Spawn Rate** is the rate at which the game tries to spawn a mob.

**Spawn Cap** is the limit of mobs that can be spawned near a player; it scales slightly with the number of nearby players.

If you reduce or increase the spawn rate of a mob, you create or take an opportunity for other mobs to fill the spawn cap. To reduce/increase the overall number of mobs, you need to change the spawn cap.

The '**In World**' tab lists current mobs and their counts, so you can spot frequent ones and adjust spawns or bans.

The game has different spawn types that this mod can disable. For example, you can disable the '**NATURAL**' spawn type to stop a mob from spawning naturally without banning it.

After editing biome spawns, you have to **restart the world** to apply changes. However, it may not work for some mobs. This feature can override default biome spawns.

![mob control menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTXV6gwq/images/6feb58d4b4d1fbbfcfc5517aadeefafaf3587119.png)

![mob cap edit screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTXV6gwq/images/6e8d1a3b2b4143ddd5e6cf2263a35c48569bbe29.png)
